summary: Examining the historical evidence for the resurrection of Jesus Christ and why it's the cornerstone of our faith.

summary: Beginning our study through the book of Romans, exploring Paul's systematic presentation of the gospel.

summary: Addressing one of the most challenging questions: If God is good and all-powerful, why does evil exist?

summary: Exploring the biblical foundation for the Trinity and why understanding God's triune nature matters for our faith.

summary: Examining the relationship between faith and reason, and how we can have confidence in our knowledge of God.

summary: Learning from Job's example how to trust God's sovereignty even when we don't understand our circumstances.
